heading: Fees for use of the George P. Shultz National Foreign Affairs Training Center
label: 2725 Fees for use of the George P. Shultz National Foreign Affairs Training Center
text: The Secretary, acting through the Under Secretary for Management is authorized to charge a fee for use of the George P. Shultz National Foreign Affairs Training Center of the Department of State. Amounts collected under this section (including reimbursements and surcharges) shall be deposited as an offsetting collection to any Department of State appropriation to recover the costs of such use and shall remain available for obligation until expended.1So in original. Probably should be followed by a comma.1
notes: Amendments2025— substituted “The Secretary, acting through the Under Secretary for Management” for “The Secretary”.Pub. L. 119–602002— inserted “George P. Shultz” before “National Foreign Affairs Training Center” in section catchline and in text.Pub. L. 107–132
